title: Software Developer
desc: Develop, test, and maintain software applications for internal business systems.

title: Backend Engineer
desc: Design and implement APIs and backend services supporting web and mobile platforms.

title: Frontend Developer
desc: Build and maintain responsive web interfaces and collaborate with UI/UX designers.

title: Mobile App Developer
desc: Develop cross-platform mobile applications for consumer-facing products.

title: DevOps Engineer
desc: Implement CI/CD pipelines, monitor infrastructure, and automate deployments.

title: Data Analyst
desc: Analyze datasets, generate business reports, and visualize trends using dashboards.

title: Quality Assurance Engineer
desc: Develop test plans, automate testing, and ensure software quality.

title: Cloud Engineer
desc: Maintain and optimize cloud infrastructure and services.

title: Product Manager
desc: Lead product development teams and define roadmaps.

title: Security Engineer
desc: Design security architectures and conduct threat assessments.

title: Technical Writer
desc: Create and maintain technical documentation for software products.

title: UX Designer
desc: Design user interfaces and improve user experience.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
desc: Ensure uptime and reliability of production systems.

title: Business Analyst
desc: Gather business requirements and support project delivery.

title: Game Developer
desc: Design and develop interactive games using Unity for desktop and mobile platforms.

title: AI/ML Engineer
desc: Develop and train machine learning models for predictive analytics and automation.

title: Cybersecurity Specialist
desc: Monitor systems for vulnerabilities, respond to threats, and enforce security policies.
